{{Infobox group
| name = Ark
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

''See also: [[Ark Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Shadow Ark]], also known as the [[Zenith Colony]], is a massive entity that functions as a colony and a place of refuge for its inhabitants. It possesses the capacity to house entire star systems within an internal space characterized by a violet sky. Physically, it often appears as a polished obsidian jewel or [[diamond]]-like structure with sharp facets that emit violet light, though it can also manifest as a muscular human man wearing organic, reflective black armor and a crown of horns. The entity is capable of dimensional isolation, making it nearly impossible to locate through magic, scanners, or advanced technology unless its protective shielding is weakened. Ark's primary purpose is to protect galactic citizens from various threats, and it maintains high standards regarding the types of beings it serves. To reach its full potential and begin integrating planets into its internal system, Ark requires a mortal bond with a [[Gatekeeper]]—a champion dedicated to service and defense who acts as the protector of its inhabitants. While not classified as a weapon, Ark is a repository of valuable materials, such as synapse nodes and thought-conduction alloy. Its ultimate goal involves cooperating with [[World Spirits]] to potentially surpass even [[The Last Horizon]].}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Ark]] is a group that may be with the attackers.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|As a member of the team, Ark serves as an entity or location capable of being opened for docking. During a visit from [[Raion]], the [[Shadow Ark]] appeared as a guest, though this version was unable to access most of its functions. Ultimately, the narrator emerged from within Ark.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Ark]] is a member of the team.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Shadow Ark]] is a guest who cannot access most of his functions.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] went to see [[Ark]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator emerged from [[Ark]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Ark]] is a location or entity that can be opened for docking.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Ark serves as a location that starships retreat into during times of conflict. As a vessel capable of being transported anywhere by the [[Lichborn]], it communicates with others through its speakers. When [[Raion]] called out to the entity to release them, Ark responded by instructing the preparation of a drone. Following these events, Ark folded in on himself with a snort.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ark]] communicates over speakers.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ark]] is a location that starships were retreating back into.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ark]] is a vessel that can be taken anywhere by the [[Lichborn]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Raion]] calls out to [[Ark]] to let them out.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ark]] instructs the preparation of a drone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ark]] folded in on himself with a snort.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"I expect a planet for this," Ark said over our speakers.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
